Boons: Party automatically wins the next initiative.
Resting here will not advance any clocks.

sources: Untouched landscapes, preserved in time, showcasing nature’s unblemished beauty.
Crumbling ruins of an ancient settlement, whispering the untold stories of a long-forgotten war.
Vibrant blossoms or rare fruits that thrive only in this secluded place.
A mystical creature wandering by, filling the air with an enchanting melody.
A rare species of animals, peacefully migrating through this once-hidden path.
A deep, shadowy cavern, glistening with gemstones of unmatched rarity.
Ethereal veils of color dance across the sky, visible only to the most observant.
A spectacular meteor shower that lights up the sky, appearing once in a lifetime.
Faint traces of ancient magic ripple through the air, offering visions of the past.
An aged statue of a forgotten hero, standing silent amidst the wilderness.
The delicate aroma of a rare plant, sought after for the finest perfumes.
Wandering musicians along the trail, performing an old and soulful melody.
A tranquil pond, its surface perfectly still, reflecting the stars even in daylight.
Hidden carvings in the rock face, telling the tale of an ancient and powerful civilization.
A mysterious grove where the trees seem to hum softly in the breeze.
A once-mighty fortress, now overtaken by nature, its walls entwined with vines.
A hidden spring with water rumored to have healing properties.
The air is filled with faint, distant laughter, but no one is to be seen.
Unusual tracks on the ground, leading deeper into the wilderness, hinting at something otherworldly.
A thick mist rolls over the land, carrying with it the scent of something long forgotten.
The distant echo of a bell, though no settlement is nearby.
A towering monolith covered in strange runes, pulsing with unknown energy.
A peaceful clearing bathed in moonlight, as though the night itself has blessed the land.
A circle of ancient stones, their surfaces weathered but still radiating a faint glow.
An overgrown pathway that seems to guide travelers, though its destination is unclear.
A lone tree stands tall, its leaves shimmering as if made of glass.
A cluster of bioluminescent fungi, casting an eerie glow across the ground.
Ancient burial mounds dot the landscape, the final resting places of long-forgotten rulers.
A distant volcano, silently smoldering, casting an orange hue over the horizon.
The remnants of an ancient battlefield, weapons and armor scattered as though the fight had just ended.
A floating island, suspended high above the land, unreachable but clearly visible.
The wind carries a distant, haunting melody, leading adventurers onward.
A patch of land that seems untouched by time, where flowers bloom in perfect harmony with the environment.
Strange symbols etched into a nearby cliffside, glowing faintly under the moonlight.
A shimmering river whose waters seem to flow both forward and backward in time.
A sunken ship, far from any ocean, half-buried in the earth and overgrown with moss.
A massive tree, split down the middle by what appears to have been a bolt of divine lightning.
A lone obelisk, standing tall amidst the wilderness, inscribed with forgotten languages.
The unmistakable sound of a waterfall, though none is visible.
A peaceful valley filled with colorful flowers, where the air smells sweet and fresh.
